sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_lines (id UInt32, geom String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT readWKTLineString(geom) * 2 AS doubled_geom FROM geo_lines WHERE id = 1;
SELECT readWKTLineString(CONCAT('LINESTRING (', CAST(a.geom, 'String'), ', ', CAST(b.geom, 'String'), ')')) * 3 AS combined_geom FROM geo_lines AS a JOIN geo_lines AS b ON a.id <> b.id;
SELECT id, readWKTLineString(geom) * (CASE WHEN geom IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS modified_geom FROM geo_lines GROUP BY id HAVING modified_geom IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC;
SELECT id, readWKTLineString('LINESTRING (0 0, 100000 100000)') * 0.5 AS res FROM geo_lines WHERE res > 0;
SELECT readWKTLineString('LINESTRING (NULL NULL)') * (SELECT MIN(id) FROM geo_lines WHERE geom IS NOT NULL) AS edge_case_geom;
SELECT readWKTLineString('LINESTRING (' || groupArray(geom) || ')') * COUNT(*) FROM geo_lines GROUP BY id;
CREATE TABLE temp_geo AS SELECT id, readWKTLineString(geom) AS geom_repr FROM geo_lines WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;
SELECT temp.id, temp.geom_repr * 1.5 FROM temp_geo AS temp LEFT JOIN geo_lines AS g ON temp.id = g.id WHERE g.id IS NOT NULL;
